passages.passage_text: Study the information carefully and answer the question. S, T, U, V, W, X, Y and Z are sitting around a circle area, with equal distance amongst each other but not necessarily in the same order. Only two people face the centre and the rest face outside (i.e., in a direction opposite to the centre). Y sits second to left of W. S sits second to left of Y. Only one person sits between S and Z. T sits to immediate right of S. T is not an immediate neighbour of Y. V is not an immediate neighbour of Y. Both the immediate neighbours of X face the centre.

Read the following information carefully to answer the questions given below. Eight friends P, Q, R, S, T, U, V and W are sitting around a circular table facing centre. Q is sitting between V and S. W is third to the left of Q and second to the right of P. R is sitting between P and V. Q and T are not sitting opposite to each other.

Study the given information and answer the given questions. Six people—K, L, M, N, O and P live on six different floors of a building not necessarily in the same order. The lower most floor of the building is numbered 1, the one above is numbered 2 and so on till the top most floor numbered 6. L lives on an even numbered floor. L lives immediately below K's floor and immediately above M's floor. P lives immediately above N's floor. P lives on an even numbered floor. O does not live on floor number 4.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Ratan would have exchanged seats with a person four places to his left, which of the following would have been true after the exchange?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If each person is placed directly opposite of his/her spouse, which of the following pair must be married?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who is sitting to immediate right of Z?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following is true regarding U as per the given sitting arrangement?

choices.a: X sits second to left of U
choices.b: Only three people sit between U and Y
choices.c: Z is one of the immediate neighbours of U
choices.e: S sits to immediate left of U

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is T's position with respect of Y?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following groups represents the immediate neighbours of X?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Four of the following five are alike in a certain way based on the given seating arrangement and so form a group. Which is the one that does not belong to that group?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following statements is not correct?

choices.a: S and P are sitting opposite to each other.
choices.b: V and Q are not sitting opposite to each other.
choices.c: R and T are sitting opposite to each other.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who is third to the left of S?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Four of the following five are alike in a certain way based on the given arrangement and hence form a group. Which of the following does not belong to that group?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Who amongst the following lives on floor number 2?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: On which floor does N live?
